name: Sorry, to explore Pirate's Isle you'll need Adventure #2
description: Sorry, to explore Pirate's Isle you'll need Adventure #2
hints: This is a joke room - a meta-reference to Scott Adams' Adventure #2 (Pirate Adventure).
There's nothing to do here. Just go UP to return to the hilltop.
UP returns to the hilltop (room 7). This room is an easter egg referencing the original Pirate Adventure game.
notes: Joke/easter egg room referencing Scott Adams' Adventure #2 (Pirate Adventure). Accessed by going DOWN from the hilltop (room 7). UP returns to the hilltop. No items or puzzles here.
